title: Emergency Signal Preemption System Contract: GTT to Miovision Name Change and Five-Year Extension
summary: Contract adjustment changes vendor name from Global Traffic Technologies (GTT) to Miovision Technologies (parent company acquisition) and formalizes five-year term with one five-year renewal option. System enables fire trucks to preempt traffic signals for emergency response. Law Department confirmed contract language consistent with prior ordinance.
